SURPRISE_ATTACK.name: Ambush
SURPRISE_ATTACK.description: Bone spears strike from behind the enemy formation.

OVERLORD.name: Overlord
OVERLORD.description: Increases the maximum number of skeletons you can control.

ELITE_SQUAD.name: Elite
ELITE_SQUAD.description: Improves the grade of summoned skeletons.

DOOMSDAY.name: Doomsday
DOOMSDAY.description: Skeletons explode upon death, dealing damage to nearby enemies.

FROSTBORNE.name: Frostborne
FROSTBORNE.description: The frozen touch of skeletons slows down the enemy's movement.

LEGION.name: Legion
LEGION.description: Simultaneously resurrects all available corpses when summoning skeletons.

THORNS.name: Thorns
THORNS.description: Golems sprout sharp spikes, reflecting damage to their attackers.

ROAR.name: Roar
ROAR.description: Golems provoke enemies to focus their backline attacks on themselves.

TABOO.name: Taboo
TABOO.description: Promotes Dark Knights to Liches and unlocks exclusive skills (Curse, Bone Prison).

WARHORSE.name: Warhorse
WARHORSE.description: Converts the Dark Knight's attack into an area-of-effect (AoE) attack.

CORROSION.name: Corrosion
CORROSION.description: Changes the Curse effect from reducing Attack to reducing Defense.

WIDE_CURSE.name: Wide Curse
WIDE_CURSE.description: Spreads the Curse to all enemies, though its individual potency is reduced.

CHAIN_EXPLOSION.name: Chain Reaction
CHAIN_EXPLOSION.description: Triggering Corpse Explosion causes all corpses on the field, including skeletons, to detonate in sequence.

VAMPIRISM.name: Vampirism
VAMPIRISM.description: Restores your own HP when absorbing souls.

EXALTATION.name: Exaltation
EXALTATION.description: Grants powerful buffs to minions during Soul Transfer at the cost of their HP.

BLOOD.name: Blood Magic
BLOOD.description: Converts all MP into HP and increases maximum HP by 30%.

RESURRECTION.name: Resurrection
RESURRECTION.description: Instantly resurrects consumed minions with 10% HP after using Bone Skills.

MEMORY.name: Memory
MEMORY.description: Increases the number of Memorize slots.

CLEANSE.name: Cleanse
CLEANSE.description: Skeleton Priests or Monks will now remove debuffs from allies.
